text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What the heck?! I'm feelin' super powerful all of a
sudden!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Have you goddesses been watchin' over me this
whole time? And not just when I'm crackin' jokes,
but when I've been runnin', too?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll put in tons of effort to thank ya! So keep your
eyes on the new Mega White Lightnin'!
